hero.description: Manage your entire business workflow without the complexity of traditional systems. Quick to implement, easy to use, and specifically designed for enterprise efficiency in the digital era.

about.title: Innovate Your Business System
about.subtitle: Building robust digital solutions through modern architecture and structured code. We help your business level up with fully customized systems.

microservices.title: Microservices Architecture
microservices.desc: We break down systems into small, independent services. This ensures high scalability and systems that remain stable even when one component is being updated.

mvc.title: MVC (Model View Controller)
mvc.desc: MVC design pattern implementation guarantees separation of business logic and presentation. The result? Organized, maintainable code and much faster feature development.

custom.title: All-Custom & ERP Scale
custom.desc: From landing pages to complex ERP-class systems. We build inventory, finance, and request submission features, fully integrated according to your business workflow.

pricing.title: Packages Services
pricing.intro: The best Mini ERP solution for your business. Choose the package that suits your company's needs. Prices can be adjusted based on additional custom feature requests.

silver.4: Permission System with Multiple User Roles

comparison.title: Pricing Features
comparison.note: Final prices may vary depending on additional custom feature requests from clients. Contact us for consultation and special offers.

exp.title: Development Career
exp.desc: Currently developing OrderApps SAS, an order management system application used to manage ordering processes and inventory lists, which will evolve into an ERP system for the company. Includes various features:

feature.1: Develop backend using PHP & Database management with MySQL
feature.2: Frontend integration with HTML, CSS, JavaScript
feature.3: CRUD features (Create, Read, Update, Delete), Approver, Generate PO, Generate PDF
feature.4: Performance optimization on desktop and smartphone browsers

footer.made: Innovate Your Business System & Make a Better Future
